description: Black textured wallet with cream accents and a woven detail in the front, branding at the bottom cornerOne main compartment with a separator sleeve, the left fold has three card slots, an insert slot and a flap with three card slots, an isert slot and an ID card slot, the right fold has a slip pocket and a buttoned coin pocketWarranty: 180 days against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
